name: Mushroom Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash mushrooms and slice half of them. Set aside.
2. Chop the remaining mushrooms and sauté in 1 tablespoon Margarine in a large pot until tender.
3. Add all vegetables (except sliced mushrooms) to the pot and cook for 6-7 minutes, stirring often.
4. Stir in all other ingredients except the mushrooms, the remaining margarine, and sherry.
5. Simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
6. Puree soup using a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade.
7. Sauté sliced mushrooms in the remaining tablespoon Margarine until golden brown.
8. Return pureed soup to the pot and add sautéed mushrooms and sherry. Reheat over moderate heat, stirring occasionally.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 VEGETABLES EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 12g; PRO: 5g; FAT: 5g; CAL: 108;
For low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Use unsalted beef broth and unsalted margarine.
